title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Whistleblower Sues Elon Musk's xAI, Claiming He Was Fired After Raising Grok Safety Concerns
summary: Devin Kim alleged he was terminated after repeatedly warning about bias, misinformation, and dangerous outputs from Elon Musk's Grok chatbot.

title: Quantum Space’s military SPAC is trying to catch SpaceX’s IPO wave
summary: Quantum Space says SPACs aren't dead as it seeks a $1.2 billion deal to build military spacecraft.

title: Franklin Templeton, BNP Paribas see tokenization boosting EU's capital efficiency
summary: Executives from Franklin Templeton and BNP Paribas say tokenized assets and stablecoins could improve capital efficiency across Europe as Wall Street expands tokenization efforts.

title: Endurance Energy raises $54M to harness a massive untapped energy source
summary: SpaceX alumni Andrew Redd is betting the ocean has vast amounts of untapped geothermal energy.

title: Digital Asset lands $355M as a16z doubles down on Wall Street blockchain rails
summary: Digital Asset raised $355M in an a16z‑led round at a $2B valuation, extending a Wall Street‑backed funding run as banks ramp up pilots on its Canton Network blockchain.

title: Audiera’s AI token BEAT beats Bitcoin, Ethereum as price surges 1,500% in a month
summary: BEAT has reached its most overbought readings on record, raising the odds of a 35% price decline in the coming days.

title: Morning Minute: Citadel Cautions Against the AI Trade Ahead of SpaceX IPO
summary: Citadel says the AI boom may be running into a cost wall, and Tether just led a $1.4B round into humanoid robotics.

title: Anthropic taps TCS to scale its enterprise AI deployments
summary: The partnership will see TCS creating a business unit focused on deploying Anthropic's AI models to its customers.

title: TradFi advisers want stablecoins, tokenization over Bitcoin: Bitwise
summary: Bitwise’s Matt Hougan says it was “pretty hard to engage with advisers on Bitcoin” during recent discussions, who are more interested in stablecoins and tokenization.

title: AI researcher claims he's already bypassed Anthropic's Fable 5 guardrails
summary: “Pliny the Liberator,” says he has been “cleverly finding the holes in the fence that the thought police missed,” in the newly launched Fable 5.

title: Archax introduces real-time yield payments for tokenized securities on Hedera
summary: The UK-regulated digital asset platform said its new system allows interest payments to follow tokenized securities in real time, with payouts distributed continuously in USDC.

title: Anthropic’s Dario Amodei has just one direct report
summary: If founders and other business leaders weren't already envious of Dario Amodei, who sits atop one of the world's fastest-growing AI companies, they're going to be seriously envious now.

title: xAI fired an engineer who raised alarms about Grok safety, new lawsuit claims
summary: A former xAI engineer is suing the company and SpaceX, alleging he was fired for raising AI safety concerns about Grok days before SpaceX's historic IPO.

title: Google's DiffusionGemma AI Hits 1,000 Tokens Per Second—And It's Free
summary: DiffusionGemma hits 1,000 tokens per second by ditching word-by-word generation entirely. It just doesn't run on most people's machines yet.

title: Anthropic CEO Warns AI Is Getting Too Powerful—While Releasing Powerful AI
summary: In a new essay, Dario Amodei called for binding safety rules for frontier models as his company heads toward an IPO.

title: The Internet Is Furious at Anthropic After Claude Fable 5 Release
summary: Token burn, silent censorship, and a mandatory data grab—the biggest Claude release has become Anthropic's messiest.

title: 在股市升空的SpaceX，可能是馬斯克迄今最大的一次豪賭
summary: SpaceX正籌備進軍股市，此舉可能改變公司發展、整體市場格局以及馬斯克的財富版圖。
